title: Cobblemon Champions Addition
description: This datapack allows Pokémon to learn their new moves from the Pokémon Champions, while also adding support for ZA Mega Pokémon that haven't been included in Champions yet.
body:
# Cobblemon Champions Addition

This addon allows Pokémon to learn their new moves from the **Pokémon Champions**, while also adding support for **ZA Mega Pokémon** that haven't been included in Champions yet.

---

### Key Features
- Champions Support : Champions balance updates - including moves, status conditions, abilities, and mechanics.
- Full Sheets : You can check the complete list of balance changes and move updates in our Google Sheets.
- Optional * ZA Mega Pokémon Movesets : Add moves for Mega Pokémon currently not available on the Champions. <- -ZA version required.


Required : Mega Showdown and its dependencies.
- For Version 1.x, Navas ZA Megas is required too.

Optional : Navas ZA Megas

All new moves are added via **TMs**. You will need a TM-related mod to actually learn and use these moves in-game.

---

### Supported Versions
* **Current Champions Version:** `1.0.2`

---

## Installation Guide

### For Singleplayer
1. Navigate to your Minecraft directory: `.minecraft/saves/[YOUR_WORLD_NAME]/datapacks`
2. Drop the downloaded `.zip` file into the `/datapacks` folder.

### For Servers
1. Navigate to your server directory: `[SERVER_FOLDER]/[WORLD_NAME]/datapacks`
2. Drop the downloaded `.zip` file into the `/datapacks` folder.

---

##  Documentations & Troubleshooting

**General Documentation**
* [Google Spreadsheets](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1WEoazBGPh7Kv1mwKqfZnKpcK82dJjogYVcWTnOTVLv4/edit?usp=sharing) for EVERY single change this datapack does.

**Where can I get help or report a bug or make a suggestion?**
* Please visit the [Mega Showdown Discord](https://discord.com/invite/DD7Fa4jrag) and look for [this](https://discord.com/channels/1334216416617824386/1512866003317424218) channel.

**I want to use ZA addition only.**
* You can download the **1.x version** of this addon, which exclusively provides move changes for ZA Megas.

**I want to use both Champions and ZA addition.**
* You could download -ZA version of this pack.

**Game crashes after installing this addon.**
* This is most likely due to a data conflict or missing dependencies. Ensure all required mods are updated. If the issue persists, you can try removing the specific configuration file that is causing the problem.

**Limitations (Things I cannot provide support for)** :
* General troubleshooting for custom/unofficial modpacks and server setups.

---

## Credits
* Thanks to @Narenhate for providing champions showdown change files!
* You can use this datapack on your modpack, but be sure to give credits to this project.
